perksWithImages.name: Barbecue & Chili
perksWithImages.description:
A deep bond with The Entity unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability.
  • After hooking a Survivor, all other Survivors' auras are revealed to you for {0} seconds when they are further than {1} meters from the hook.

perksWithImages.name: Overcome
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever you take damage:
  • You retain your speed boost for {Tunable.S29P01.ExtraBoostTime}s longer.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S29P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Overzealous
perksWithImages.description: Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, until you take damage, you repair {Tunable.S31P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster. If that Totem was a Hex Totem, the effect is doubled.

perksWithImages.name: Territorial Imperative
perksWithImages.description:
Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability. Survivors' auras are revealed to you for {0} seconds when they enter the basement and you are more than {1} meters away from the basement entrance.

Territorial Imperative can only be triggered once every {2} seconds.
